paper_metadata.title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models
paper_metadata.abstract: This report introduces a new family of multimodal models, Gemini, that exhibit remarkable capabilities across image, audio, video, and text understanding. The Gemini family consists of Ultra, Pro, and Nano sizes, suitable for applications ranging from complex reasoning tasks to on-device memory-constrained use-cases. Evaluation on a broad range of benchmarks shows that our most-capable Gemini Ultra model advances the state of the art in 30 of 32 of these benchmarks - notably being the first model to achieve human-expert performance on the well-studied exam benchmark MMLU, and improving the state of the art in every one of the 20 multimodal benchmarks we examined. We believe that the new capabilities of the Gemini family in cross-modal reasoning and language understanding will enable a wide variety of use cases. We discuss our approach toward post-training and deploying Gemini models responsibly to users through services including Gemini, Gemini Advanced, Google AI Studio, and Cloud Vertex AI.

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini 1.0 Ultra introduces a highly capable multimodal model with a unified architecture trained on diverse text and image data, enabling strong performance across vision, language, and audio tasks. It leverages a unified encoder-decoder framework to support cross-modal understanding and generation.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Web documents, books, code, image, audio, and video data
extraction_data.extension: Multi-query attention enables efficient inference and stable training at scale.
extraction_data.research_problem: Multimodal understanding and generation with high-capacity models
extraction_data.application: Complex reasoning, multimodal tasks, on-device applications, text and image generation, audio understanding
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini Nano-1 is a 1.8B parameter model distilled from larger Gemini models, optimized for low-memory devices with 4-bit quantization and best-in-class performance for on-device tasks.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Web documents, books, code, image, audio, and video data
extraction_data.application: On-device summarization, reading comprehension, low-latency multimodal tasks
extraction_data.extension: 4-bit quantized and distilled from larger models to enable efficient on-device deployment.
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini Nano-2 is a 3.25B parameter model distilled from larger Gemini models, designed for high-memory devices with 4-bit quantization and best-in-class performance for on-device tasks.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Web documents, books, code, image, audio, and video data
extraction_data.application: On-device summarization, reading comprehension, low-latency multimodal tasks
extraction_data.extension: 4-bit quantized and distilled from larger models to enable efficient on-device deployment.
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini Ultra introduces a highly capable multimodal model trained on diverse text, image, audio, and video data, enabling state-of-the-art performance across multiple modalities without task-specific tuning. It achieves human-expert-level performance on the MMLU benchmark (90.0%) and sets new state-of-the-art results on multimodal reasoning benchmarks such as MMMU.
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Multimodal pre-training across text, image, audio, and video
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale multimodal dataset (text, image, audio, video) with quality and safety filtering
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Post-training for instruction following, reasoning, and domain-specific tasks
extraction_data.extension: Multi-query attention enables efficient attention computation for long-context multimodal inputs.
extraction_data.research_problem: Multimodal language understanding, safety in AI systems, balancing helpfulness and harmlessness in responses
extraction_data.application: Education, intelligent tutoring, complex reasoning systems, code generation, scientific problem solving, multilingual tasks, long-context summarization, and real-world multimodal applications
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini Pro is a multimodal model trained jointly on text, image, audio, and video, achieving strong performance across diverse tasks including reasoning, coding, and multilingual understanding. It outperforms inference-optimized models like GPT-3.5 and performs comparably with top models on academic benchmarks.
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Multimodal pre-training across text, image, audio, and video
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale multimodal dataset (text, image, audio, video) with quality and safety filtering
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Post-training for instruction following, reasoning, and domain-specific tasks
extraction_data.extension: Multi-query attention enables efficient attention computation for long-context multimodal inputs.
extraction_data.research_problem: Multimodal understanding and reasoning across text, image, audio, and video
extraction_data.application: Research acceleration, Google product features, Gemini App, Search Generative Experience, external developer use via Google Cloud Vertex API and Google Labs
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini Nano1 is a lightweight, on-device multimodal model optimized for mobile and edge deployment. It maintains strong zero-shot performance on image and text understanding tasks, enabling real-time multimodal reasoning directly on user devices without relying on external tools or cloud infrastructure.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale multimodal corpus (text, images, video, audio)
extraction_data.application: On-device image understanding, real-time video analysis, mobile AI applications, privacy-preserving multimodal tasks
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Post-training for multimodal understanding and generation
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini Pro 1.0 is a multimodal model trained on a diverse corpus of text, vision, and audio data, followed by post-training using supervised fine-tuning, reward modeling, and reinforcement learning from human feedback to improve instruction following, safety, and factual grounding.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale text, image, and audio corpus
extraction_data.application: Conversational AI, task completion using external tools (e.g., Google Flights, Maps), instruction following, content generation, and cross-modal reasoning
extraction_data.research_problem: Multimodal understanding and reasoning across text, vision, and audio
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT), Reward Modeling (RM), Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF)
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini Apps models are fine-tuned on a balanced mixture of text-only and image-text data, enabling robust image understanding without degrading text-only performance. Post-training via SFT and RLHF improves multimodal task performance by +0.223 SxS score on image understanding tasks.
extraction_data.application: Chat, image understanding, content summarization, accessibility, and general-purpose AI assistance in consumer-facing applications
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Multimodal pre-training on text and image data
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF)
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini Advanced leverages the Gemini Ultra model with enhanced post-training via SFT and RLHF, achieving superior performance in coding, image understanding, and multimodal reasoning, outperforming previous models like Bard (PaLM2) on internal coding benchmarks.
extraction_data.application: Advanced AI assistance, coding, image and document understanding, scientific reasoning, and complex task execution
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Multimodal pre-training on text and image data
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF)
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini Nano is a lightweight, on-device model optimized for mobile and edge deployment. It enables real-time multimodal reasoning directly on user devices, with strong performance in low-latency, privacy-preserving applications.
extraction_data.research_problem: On-device multimodal reasoning with minimal latency and high privacy
extraction_data.application: On-device chat, image captioning, voice assistants, real-time translation
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini 1.0 Pro is a compact, high-performance multimodal model designed for efficient deployment across devices. It maintains strong cross-modal capabilities while being optimized for speed and resource efficiency.
extraction_data.application: Mobile applications, real-time chat, on-device multimodal tasks, content summarization
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini 1.0 Nano is a lightweight multimodal model optimized for edge and mobile environments. It enables on-device multimodal understanding with minimal latency and memory footprint.
extraction_data.application: Smartphones, IoT devices, real-time image and speech analysis, privacy-preserving AI
extraction_data.extension: Multi-query attention enables efficient attention computation for long-context multimodal inputs.
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini 1.5 introduces a highly scalable multimodal model with enhanced long-context reasoning and cross-modal alignment. It uses a novel sparse attention mechanism to support extended context windows while maintaining efficiency.
extraction_data.application: Document analysis, code generation, complex reasoning, video understanding, scientific modeling
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini 2.0 introduces a more scalable and efficient architecture with improved training dynamics and better generalization across modalities. It supports higher-quality generation and reasoning in complex, real-world scenarios.
extraction_data.application: Multimodal reasoning, scientific discovery, creative content generation, enterprise automation, education
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models
